image:image.image:title: Birria Tacos with House Margarita — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Slow-cooked beef birria tacos with rice, beans and a house margarita at Campo Taco Co., 1001 S Saunders St, Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: Street Tacos and Cocktails — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Fresh street tacos served alongside craft cocktails at Campo Taco Co., Raleigh NC.

image:image.image:title: Street Tacos Plate with Rice and Beans — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Assorted street tacos served on a white plate with chips, rice and beans at Campo Taco Co. in Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: Texas Fajitas — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Texas fajitas with grilled chicken, steak and shrimp, served with peppers, onions and flour tortillas at Campo Taco Co.

image:image.image:title: House Made Chips with Guacamole and Queso — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: House made tortilla chips served with fresh guacamole and home made queso dip at Campo Taco Co. in Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: Margarita Tower at Campo Taco Co. Bar — Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Signature margarita tower at the Campo Taco Co. bar — 9 cocktails for $25 in Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: Margarita Tower with Food — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Colorful margarita tower alongside tacos and sides at Campo Taco Co. restaurant in Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: House Margaritas — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Three colorful house margaritas — lime, strawberry and watermelon — at Campo Taco Co. in Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: Cantarito Cocktail — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Handcrafted Cantarito cocktail with orange, flower garnish and Tajin rim at Campo Taco Co. in Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: Craft Cocktail with Tajin Rim — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Artisanal craft cocktail garnished with a flower and Tajin rim at Campo Taco Co., Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: Restaurant Bar and Dining Area — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Interior bar and dining area at Campo Taco Co., 1001 S Saunders St, Raleigh, NC. Open daily for lunch and dinner.

image:image.image:title: Restaurant Interior Full Bar View — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Full view of the interior bar and dining room at Campo Taco Co. Mexican restaurant in Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: Bar with Jarritos and Tequila Selection — Campo Taco Co. Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Well-stocked bar featuring Jarritos display and extensive tequila selection at Campo Taco Co. in Raleigh, NC.

image:image.image:title: Campo Taco Co. Restaurant Exterior — 1001 S Saunders St Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Exterior facade of Campo Taco Co. at 1001 S Saunders St, Raleigh, NC 27603.

image:image.image:title: Campo Taco Co. Sign — 1001 S Saunders St Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Campo Taco Co. storefront sign at 1001 S Saunders St, Raleigh, NC — fresh Mexican restaurant open daily.

image:image.image:title: Campo Taco Co. Facade — Raleigh NC
image:image.image:caption: Exterior facade of Campo Taco Co. Mexican restaurant in Raleigh, NC under a blue sky.

image:image.image:caption: Main entrance of Campo Taco Co. at 1001 S Saunders St, Raleigh, NC 27603.
